personal.name: Komal Harshita Karanakota
personal.summary: Aspiring Data Analyst with experience in SQL, Python, Excel, and Power BI through analytics internships, dashboard development, and data-driven projects. Skilled in exploratory data analysis, KPI reporting, business intelligence, and transforming raw datasets into actionable insights. Strong interest in solving operational and business problems using data visualization, reporting, and analytical thinking.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

points: Analyzed large-scale datasets using Python and Pandas to identify anomalies, trends, and actionable insights for the Tiger STRIPES initiative.
Automated weekly aggregation and transformation workflows for 100,000+ records using NumPy, reducing processing time by 40%.
Improved reporting efficiency and dataset organization to support faster data analysis and insight generation.
Applied process mining and workflow analysis techniques to identify operational bottlenecks and inefficiencies affecting business performance.
Evaluated business process flows and proposed data-backed recommendations to improve operational efficiency and workflow optimization.
Managed open-source project workflows, reviewed contributions, and mentored contributors across collaborative GitHub-based development tasks.
Coordinated issue tracking, pull request reviews, and contributor support within an active open-source community.
Strengthened collaboration, project management, and technical communication skills through community leadership.

projects.title: Urban Sustainability Analysis
points: Analyzed urban sustainability datasets to identify patterns related to infrastructure, livability, and environmental performance across cities.
Created visual reports and comparative analyses to support data-driven understanding of urban development trends.
Performed exploratory data analysis and visualization to uncover insights from public datasets.

caseStudy.challenge: Recruiters and researchers struggle to synthesize multiple disparate public datasets (ranging from green space acreage and density to air quality indexes and general citizen happiness) into unified, actionable urban planning policies.
approach: Data Cleaning & Standarization: standardizing metrics across various global datasets using Pandas and NumPy, handling missing/null records.
Exploratory Data Analysis: mapping multiple correlations (such as green canopy volume vs. average ambient temperature) to determine environmental impact.
Data Storytelling: building a clean visualization suite featuring joint-plots and correlation heatmaps to make complex multi-dimensional insights immediately accessible.
results: Discovered a powerful 78% correlation between per-capita public green spaces and overall citizen health satisfaction.
Highlighted top 10 global cities acting as benchmarks for sustainable development policies.
Built a clean, modular Python codebase enabling automated reporting on any new public city dataset.

projects.title: Celonis Business Process Analysis Case Study
points: Analyzed enterprise workflow data using process mining concepts to identify operational bottlenecks and inefficiencies affecting business performance.
Evaluated process flows and proposed data-backed recommendations to improve workflow optimization and operational efficiency.
Applied analytical thinking and business process analysis techniques to support data-driven decision-making.

caseStudy.challenge: Large enterprise Accounts Payable (AP) workflows are highly complex and prone to hidden operational leakages, processing delays, and compliance issues that standard analytics dashboards fail to trace.
approach: Process Ingestion: uploaded transactional action event logs into Celonis to map real-life process paths.
Variant Analysis: compared 20+ process variations against standard happy paths to discover structural deviations.
Value Framing: quantified financial leakages caused by payment terms mismatching and manual check-cutting.
results: Identified manual validation bottlenecks causing an average of 5.2 days delay per transaction.
Framed an automated matching solution estimated to eliminate 15% of workflow redundancies.
Presented data-backed recommendations ready to save substantial operational capital.

projects.title: ProdigyFlow — Automated Data Analytics Pipeline
points: Designed an automated analytics pipeline for CSV ingestion, data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and chart generation.
Built reusable workflows for automated reporting and visualization, improving efficiency in repetitive analytics tasks.
Streamlined analytics workflows through automated data processing and report generation pipelines.

caseStudy.challenge: Business analysts frequently lose hours daily performing repetitive manual tasks like file parsing, column type correction, raw data profiling, and initial insight generation.
approach: Pipeline Automation: developed modular Python routines using Pandas to ingest CSV files, detect schemas, and clean anomalous characters.
AI Co-Pilot Integration: linked Google Gemini API to analyze summary statistics and generate natural-language anomaly descriptions.
Dashboard Output: auto-generated standard data profiling reports complete with clean matplotlib chart plots.
results: Reduced the time required for initial raw dataset profiling from hours to under 30 seconds.
Built a robust, zero-code tool accessible to non-technical business partners.
Streamlined repeating analytics workflows through fully reusable, standardized pipelines.
